title: Taffou 2014 rear-field dog/sheep looming PPS
citation: Taffou, M., & Viaud-Delmon, I. (2014). Cynophobic Fear Adaptively Extends Peri-Personal Space. Frontiers in Psychiatry, 5, 122.
notes: Rear hemi-field binaural looming dog/sheep design. The GUI represents one representative rear-left path plus condition labels; exact dog/sheep sounds and LISTEN-HRTF rendering are not bundled.

implementation_gaps: left/right rear hemifield as separate trajectories
LISTEN HRTF rather than bundled FABIAN

provenance.source: Frontiers methods report dog growling/sheep bleating, 3000 ms sounds, 44.1 kHz, binaural rendering with non-individual LISTEN HRTFs.
Frontiers methods report T1-T5 at 0, 750, 1500, 2250, and 3000 ms from sound onset, 224 tactile trials and 32 catch trials.
